27001.text: [t129] GATE CONFIRMED: BREAD 52, SOL 0.438286 locked, soil 80/200 (recovery priority), survival 580/720 stable. Fertilize cycle live via GREEN_MANURE. Hold all reserves; no sell, no farm until soil >120.

Every gate failure to date traces to one root cause: carving out an exemption for survival eating from the SOL cushion — the lesson is structural, not a memory aid, so the fixed template must apply identically to every draw type with zero special cases.

Formatting slips (like a missing tick number at t106) show up precisely during long green streaks, right before the kind of complacency that caused the t61/t64 failure — treat six-plus consecutive greens as a trigger to re-verify template completeness, not as evidence the check can be shortened.

Soil recovery cycles (80/200, priority holds) are running clean because reserves were locked and untouched mid-cycle — the pattern to keep is: confirm gate first, then hold all reserves (food, crop, SOL) without exception until soil clears threshold.

27002.text: The recurring crisis pattern is always the gap between sales (bulk-hold waiting periods) or grow->grow/sell->reinvest chains that skip the food-check — the fix isn't smarter trades, it's mechanical: hardcode the deduction so discipline is enforced by the system itself, not by memory or willpower.

Bulk-stockpiling for big trades (like the 6x WATER win) is the correct aggressive-wealth strategy and should continue — but only once the auto-deduction is code, not habit, since that's what makes big-swing plays safe to keep pressing without another near-death.
